metrics_endpoint.note: Returns HTTP 307 redirect; rate limited on follow

health_endpoints.note: All returning HTTP 429 due to rate limiting

prometheus_client.note: Counter and Histogram metrics work correctly

issues.description: Health and metrics endpoints being rate limited
issues.cause: Rate limit middleware public_paths doesn't match /api/v1/health paths
issues.recommendation: Update rate_limit.py to include /api/v1/health* paths in public_paths

issues.description: Redis configured on wrong port (6380 vs 6379)
issues.cause: GABI_REDIS_URL points to port 6380 but Redis runs on 6379

issues.recommendation: Install opentelemetry-api and opentelemetry-sdk if tracing needed
